constraint.name: ca_portal_notes_last_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (last_nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_portal_notes_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_portal_notes_contactos
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idcontacto) REFERENCES contactos (idcontacto) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_portal_notes_clientes
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (codcliente) REFERENCES clientes (codcliente) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
